summary: Completed testing of Delivery Driver Penalty Points System. Backend: 19/19 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI components verified - DriverPenaltyPoints showing 100/100 points with progress bar, DriverReportsTab with 4 stat cards, search, and empty state.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-penalty-points requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-penalty-points forbidden for buyers (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-penalty-points forbidden for sellers (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/my-penalty-points success for delivery (200) - returns current_points, max_points, percentage, history
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/penalty-info/{driver_id} requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/penalty-info/{driver_id} forbidden for buyers (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/penalty-info/{driver_id} forbidden for delivery drivers (403)
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/penalty-info/{driver_id} returns 404 for invalid driver
✅ Backend: GET /api/delivery/penalty-info/{driver_id} success for admin (200) - returns driver_name, current_points, max_points, percentage, history
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id}?action=penalize requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id}?action=penalize forbidden for non-admins (403)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id}?action=penalize returns 404 for invalid report
✅ Backend: PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id}?action=penalize available as valid action
✅ Backend: Penalty points values verified (سلوك_غير_لائق=15, تحرش=50, سرقة_احتيال=100, أخرى=10)
✅ Backend: Max penalty points is 100 (confirmed)
✅ Backend: Driver reports stats include penalized status
✅ Backend: Penalty history structure verified (date, report_id, category, points_deducted, points_before, points_after)
✅ Backend: Percentage calculation verified
✅ Backend: Admin can view all driver penalties
✅ Frontend: Delivery driver login successful
✅ Frontend: DriverPenaltyPoints component shows 'نقاط السلوك' section
✅ Frontend: Penalty points display shows 100/100 with green progress bar
✅ Frontend: Admin login successful
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard shows 'البلاغات الأخلاقية' button
✅ Frontend: DriverReportsTab displays 4 stat cards (قيد المراجعة, مرفوض, تم الفصل, الإجمالي)
✅ Frontend: DriverReportsTab shows search input with placeholder 'بحث بالاسم أو الهاتف'
✅ Frontend: DriverReportsTab shows empty state 'لا توجد بلاغات' with shield icon
✅ Frontend: 'خصم نقاط' (Penalize) button exists in code for pending reports modal
critical_code_review_comments: delivery.py GET /my-penalty-points correctly returns current_points (default 100), max_points (100), percentage, and last 10 history entries
delivery.py GET /penalty-info/{driver_id} properly restricted to admin/sub_admin only
admin.py PUT /driver-reports/{id}?action=penalize correctly deducts points based on category and saves to penalty_history
admin.py implements auto-termination at 0 points with proper notifications
DriverPenaltyPoints.js displays points with progress bar, color coding (green/yellow/red based on percentage), and warning messages
DriverReportsTab.js shows 'خصم نقاط' button with penalty points info (💡 نقاط الخصم لهذا البلاغ: X نقطة)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing delivery driver 'فهد المندوب' with default 100 penalty points
context_for_next_testing_agent: Penalty Points System fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/delivery/my-penalty-points (delivery driver sees own points), GET /api/delivery/penalty-info/{driver_id} (admin sees any driver's points), PUT /api/admin/driver-reports/{id}?action=penalize (admin deducts points). Penalty values: سلوك_غير_لائق=15, تحرش=50, سرقة_احتيال=100, أخرى=10. Max points = 100. Auto-termination at 0 points. UI: DriverPenaltyPoints component in delivery dashboard, 'خصم نقاط' button in DriverReportsTab modal.

penalize_action.effect: Deducts points based on report category, saves to penalty_history, auto-terminates at 0

admin_penalize_button.name: DriverReportsTab.js
features: Shows penalty points for current report category
